overall_assessment: Generated 48 hypotheses across 20 leverage, 15 blockage, and 1 lock-in dimensions. High-confidence hypotheses: 24. Bottom line:  The network is structurally open — targeted link addition and brokerage strengthening can enable change.

hypotheses.label: Change Clothes Crumlin | Educate Together | Fighting Words | iScoil | Not So Different
hypotheses.hypothesis: The innermost k-core (k=3) contains 20 nodes (20.5% of graph). Types: {'project': 10}. This resembles a policy monopoly (Sabatier & Jenkins-Smith, 1993) — an entrenched coalition controlling resources and framing. The robustness gap (-0.0190) indicates the system degrades faster under targeted removal than random failure, confirming dependency on this core.
hypotheses.action: Don't challenge the core directly. Fund venue-shopping: peripheral advocacy groups that can reframe the dominant issue image and shift debates to alternative forums. Identify secondary-belief alignments where peripheral coalitions can form tactical alliances.

hypotheses.label: 259 peripheral nodes, 3 high-confidence GNN links
hypotheses.hypothesis: The network has 259 peripheral nodes (degree 1-2) — spare capacity for rewiring. There are 3 high-confidence GNN-predicted links and 2 that would merge components. Adding these links could integrate stranded nodes without triggering systemic resistance.
hypotheses.action: Prioritize the 2 component-merging links to reduce fragmentation. Design joint initiatives that pair peripheral nodes with core actors.

hypotheses.label: Surf Club ↔ Mental Health & Wellbeing
hypotheses.hypothesis: Linking 'Surf Club' to 'Mental Health & Wellbeing' (probability=1.000) could reinforce collaboration. This is a 'Project alignment' recommendation.
hypotheses.action: Design a joint initiative requiring partnership between these two entities.

hypotheses.hypothesis: Linking 'Active Disabilities Ireland' to 'Hair Together' (probability=1.000) could reinforce collaboration. This is a 'Actor coordination' recommendation.

hypotheses.label: Funding gap: community_autonomy narratives are under-resourced
hypotheses.metric: top=cultural_identity: €17,598,431 (13 claims, 20 entities) | bottom=community_autonomy: €0 (1 claims, 2 entities)
hypotheses.hypothesis: Claim value dimension 'community_autonomy' is linked to only €0 in funding (2 entities), while 'cultural_identity' commands €17,598,431. This may represent a structural misalignment between narrative priorities and resource allocation.
